items.title: Rivian's Biggest Challenge Might Still Be Around The Corner
items.description: Rivian continues to burn cash with automotive sales dropping and persistent losses, despite some improvement in margins. Read why RIVN stock is a Sell.

items.title: Technical Interview Preparation Course For Software Engineers and Engineering Managers - Interview Kickstart's Roadmap to Google, Meta & Amazon Jobs in 2025 and Top Tech Salaries
items.description: Santa Clara, Sept. 08, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Santa Clara, California - September 08, 2025 - In 2025, the landscape for software engineers aiming to break into FAANG companies has become increasingly competitive. While hiring volumes at major tech firms have rebounded by approximately 40% year over year, the recruitment process has grown more selective and rigorous.
